steps.title: Identify the knowledge gap being addressed
steps.content: The passage states that “little is known about juveniles during their oceanic stage,” then presents research examining this exact stage.

steps.title: Connect the gap to the main purpose
steps.content: The text's main purpose is to summarize research findings on the understudied oceanic stage. The other three choices either focus on a secondary detail (B), misrepresent the scope of comparison (C), or describe conservation efforts not shown in the passage (D). That matches choice A — A is correct.
